name: pm_backlog
description: Decompose the PRD into an initial backlog - epics, features, tasks, priorities, dependencies, and suggested iterations from MVP to v1.
default_prompt: Use $pm_backlog when the task matches the "PM Backlog" skill.
triggers: Decompose the PRD into an initial backlog - epics, features, tasks, priorities, dependencies, and suggested iterations from MVP to v1
